column1: CONFIRMATION ANDCANCELLATION POLICY • Block bookings MUST be confirmed a minimum of 60 days in peak season, and 30 days prior to arrival for the rest of year. • A non-refundable 30% deposit of the total invoice is required upon confirmation of the booking. • 100% payment of the total Invoice is required 45 days prior to the date of arrival for all the seasons. • Cancelation 61+ days, prior to arrival - no cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 46-60 days, prior to arrival - 25% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 22-45 days, prior to arrival - 50% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation 72 hrs - 21 days, prior to arrival - 75% cancellation fee charged. • Cancellation less than 72 hours, or no-show - 100% cancellation fee charged.
column2: CONTRACTTERMSAND CONDITIONS • This agreement is valid for the year 2024 and must be renewed annually. • These rates are confidential and cannot be made available to any 3rd party through internet sites, e-mail, or any form of publishing. • A tour leader of a group pays 50% of the contracted rates. • Travel Agents pay 30% of the contracted rates, unless invited, or agreed with the Management of Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp - NOTavailable during Peak Season. • Check in on arrival date is from 12 pm (noon), • Check-out is at 10:00 am. • Should the government alter rates, the camp reserves the right to negotiate the rates with contracted agents. • The hotel reserves the right of admission, and the rooms are subject to availability. • Bush/outdoor activities such as bush dinner, bush breakfast, sundowner, and walking safari are weather- permitting. • Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp does NOT allow pets in, or on the premise.
